gist.headline: Watering the metrics
gist.blurb: Our automated bot just watered the garden, updating the latest app metrics and health checks across the ecosystem.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of application metrics, health checks, and greenhouse statistics in the repository documentation.
gist.impact: Keeps the community showcase and README up-to-date with the latest usage numbers and app statuses.
gist.visual_concept: The Monitor Robot acting as an automated gardener, watering a garden of data and numbers while Polly the bee checks off a daily task list.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head watering a digital garden where glowing numbers and code-plants sprout from lime green (#ecf874) flower pots. The cute bee mascot hovers nearby with a tiny clipboard checking off tasks. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head watering a digital garden where glowing numbers and code-plants sprout from lime green (#ecf874) flower pots. The cute bee mascot hovers nearby with a tiny clipboard checking off tasks. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley.
